en.text: Siwak (to clean the teeth with Siwak which is a tooth-brush in the form of a pencil from the roots of the Arak tree

ar.text: وَبِإِسْنَادِهِ قَالَ ‏ "‏ لاَ يَبُولَنَّ أَحَدُكُمْ فِي الْمَاءِ الدَّائِمِ الَّذِي لاَ يَجْرِي، ثُمَّ يَغْتَسِلُ فِيهِ ‏"‏‏.‏

al.text: Asnjëri prej jush të mos urinojë në ujin e palëvizshëm, i cili nuk rrjedh, e pastaj të lahet në të.

en.narrator: The same narrator said that the Prophet (ﷺ) had said:
en.text: "You should not pass urine in stagnant water which is not flowing then (you may need to) wash in it."
